name: phenotype-mcp-asset
absorption_pr: KooshaPari/phenotype-mcp-asset#1 (McpKit extraction PR B — substrate carve-out)
redirect: phenotype-mcp-asset (this repo; extracted as independent pheno-*-lib)
rationale: McpKit was a multi-substrate mega-repo (Python+TS+Rust pack handlers, asset library, agent servers). Per ADR-003 (McpKit absorption into PhenoMCP) and ADR-017 (surface-reduction-1: cap at 1 substrate per concern), the Rust 'phenotype-mcp-asset' carve-out is a pure Rust library that handles MCP asset/pack semantics. Extracting it to its own repo honors the 'pheno-*-lib = one concern, one crate' substrate rule (ADR-023). It is the first Rust substrate carved out of McpKit; the Python carve-out is agentmcp-hex (row #54) and the agent-runner substrate is in KooshaPari/Agentora (row #53).
role_in_fleet: pheno-*-lib — reusable underlying capability for MCP pack/asset handling. Consumed by PhenoMCP, PhenoMCPServers, and any future MCP client that needs to load, validate, or transform asset bundles.
test_status: builds standalone; unit tests under tests/; integration with PhenoMCP pending consumer migration
